mapper.select: SELECT * FROM film_review_reply WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM film_review_reply WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO film_review_reply (review_id, user_id, parent_reply_id, content, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{userId}, #{parentReplyId}, #{content}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE film_review_reply SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
